narrative:
West Chester Twp 21 (precinct in Butler County) has 1,362 registered voters, with 60.6% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 18.4% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 20.9%, a modest Democratic lean of 2.5 percentage points.
